description: There is a contaminated water crisis in my area

messages.text:
I'm so sorry to hear that there's a water crisis in your area. I'm here to help you register your issue and provide assistance.

Can you please tell me a bit more about the issue? When did the water crisis start in your area? Was it a sudden disruption, or has it been ongoing?

It sounds like the water crisis has been a persistent issue. Can you tell me how severe the water crisis is in your area on a scale of low, medium, or high? Is it affecting most of the community, or is it isolated to a specific area or a few households?

(Note: I'll make sure to take detailed notes of your issue, and we'll get to the bottom of this together.)

I'm so sorry to hear that the water crisis is not only ongoing but also contaminated. That's extremely concerning and potentially harmful to public health.

Can you please tell me which category this issue falls under? Is it related to water supply, water treatment, or something else? We have categories for water, electricity, road, sanitation, and other issues. Let me know which one best fits your situation.
